NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​ViewModels.​UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​Helpers.​ChangeNotifier
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​UI.​WPF.​ViewModels.​UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel

View model for views that detail updates that are available for a given user

Variables
_updates
private List<AppCastItem> _updates
_cancellationToken
private CancellationToken? _cancellationToken
_cancellationTokenSource
private CancellationTokenSource? _cancellationTokenSource
_titleHeaderText
private string? _titleHeaderText
_infoText
private string? _infoText
_isRemindMeLaterEnabled
private bool _isRemindMeLaterEnabled
_isSkipEnabled
private bool _isSkipEnabled
_areReleaseNotesVisible
private bool _areReleaseNotesVisible
_isRemindMeLaterVisible
private bool _isRemindMeLaterVisible
_isSkipVisible
private bool _isSkipVisible
_userResponse
private UpdateAvailableResult _userResponse
Functions
UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel
public UpdateAvailableWindowViewModel()

Initialize the view model with release notes, remind me later, and skip button being visible by default.

Properties
ReleaseNotesDisplayer
public IReleaseNotesDisplayer? ReleaseNotesDisplayer {
get;
set
}

Interface object for the object that will be displaying the release notes

UserRespondedHandler
public IUserRespondedToUpdateCheck? UserRespondedHandler {
get;
set
}

Interface object for the object that can handle user responses to the update that is being shown to the user

ReleaseNotesGrabber
public ReleaseNotesGrabber? ReleaseNotesGrabber {
get;
set
}

Object responsible for downloading and formatting markdown release notes for display in HTML

TitleHeaderText
public string TitleHeaderText {
get;
set
}

Header text to show to the user. Usually something along the lines of "A new version of {software} is available!"

InfoText
public string InfoText {
get;
set
}

Some additional text to show to the user underneath the header. This is text like "Version {version} is now available. Do you want to download it?"

IsRemindMeLaterEnabled
public bool IsRemindMeLaterEnabled {
get;
set
}

Whether or not the "Remind Me Later" button is enabled

IsSkipEnabled
public bool IsSkipEnabled {
get;
set
}

Whether or not the "Skip this Update" button is enabled

Updates
public List<AppCastItem> Updates {
get
}

The list of updates that are available for downloading by the user

AreReleaseNotesVisible
public bool AreReleaseNotesVisible {
get;
set
}

Whether or not the release notes for updates are shown to the user

IsRemindMeLaterVisible
public bool IsRemindMeLaterVisible {
get;
set
}

Whether or not the "Remind Me Later" button is visible

IsSkipVisible
public bool IsSkipVisible {
get;
set
}

Whether or not the "Skip this Update" button is visible

UserResponse
public UpdateAvailableResult UserResponse {
get
}

The response that the user gave to the update

Skip
public ICommand Skip {
get
}

Command to execute when the user wants to skip this update

RemindMeLater
public ICommand RemindMeLater {
get
}

Command to execute when the user wants to be reminded about this update later

DownloadInstall
public ICommand DownloadInstall {
get
}

Command to execute when the user wants to download and install the update right away

Functions
PerformSkip
public void PerformSkip()

Skip updating the software

PerformRemindMeLater
public void PerformRemindMeLater()

Hide the update window and show it to the user at another time

PerformDownloadInstall
public void PerformDownloadInstall()

Start downloading the update so that the user can install it

SendResponse
private void SendResponse(
UpdateAvailableResult 
response
)
Initialize
public void Initialize(
List<AppCastItem> 
items,
ISignatureVerifier? 
signatureVerifier,
bool 
isUpdateAlreadyDownloaded
 = 
false,
string 
releaseNotesHTMLTemplate
 = 
"",
string 
additionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML
 = 
"",
string 
releaseNotesDateFormat
 = 
"D",
string 
appNameTitle
 = 
"the application",
string 
installedVersion
 = 
""
)

Initialize this view model with its necessary items so that it can display things to the user properly

Parameters
signatureVerifier
ISignatureVerifier?

The  for verifying release note signatures

items
List<AppCastItem>

The list of  updates that are available for the user

isUpdateAlreadyDownloaded
bool

Whether or not the update is already downloaded ot the user's computer

releaseNotesHTMLTemplate
string

The HTML string template to show for the release notes

additionalReleaseNotesHeaderHTML
string

The HTML string to add into the head element of the HTML for the release notes

releaseNotesDateFormat
string

Date format for release notes

appNameTitle
string

Title for application

installedVersion
string

Currently installed version of application

LoadReleaseNotes
private async void LoadReleaseNotes(
List<AppCastItem> 
items
)
Cancel
public void Cancel()

Cancel the download of release notes or other asynchronous operations taking place
